command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phí %s &Expense.Nested.Message.v; trong danh mục phí.' else N'The expense %s is &Expense.Nested.Message.e;.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phí %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the expense %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phí %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the expense %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã phí %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The expense %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where &Expense.Nested.Key.a;) begin select 'ma_phi' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_phi)) as message return end &UnitBeforeInsert; select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_phi = $ma_phi.OldValue) begin select 'ma_phi' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_phi.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_phi <> $ma_phi.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where &Expense.Nested.Key.a; and ma_phi <> $ma_phi.OldValue) begin select 'ma_phi' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_phi)) as message return end end
if @ma_phi <> $ma_phi.OldValue begin if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_phi = $ma_phi.OldValue) begin select 'ma_phi' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_phi.OldValue)) as message return end end
&UnitBeforeUpdate;

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_phi = @ma_phi
&UnitPostUpdate;

declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_phi)) if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_phi = @ma_phi) begin select @message as message return end &UnitPostDelete;
